name: cron-forge-mcp
description: MCP server for cron expression parsing, validation, human-readable explanation, and next run calculations.

tools.name: explain_cron
tools.description: Explain a cron expression in human-readable English.

tools.name: next_cron_runs
tools.description: Calculate the next N run times for a cron expression.

tools.name: validate_cron
tools.description: Validate a cron expression and return detailed field analysis.
